column1: # Calendar-only additions to mirca_os_crop_mapping.csv: MIRCA-OS classes whose
# monthly growing-area grids feed the irrigated crop calendar
# (build_mirca_crop_calendar) but which are excluded from the multi-cropping
# class may map to several GLADE crops (all receive the same monthly profile;
# the class's growing area is split evenly between them for weighting).
